seoTitle: How to Make Double-Sided Bookmarks in Canva
metaDescription: Learn how to design double-sided bookmarks in Canva, from layout to exporting a print-ready file for both sides.
intro: Double-sided bookmarks give you twice the design space for branding, quotes, or promotional messages. This tutorial covers setting up a Canva project for double-sided bookmarks and exporting both sides ready for print.

steps.heading: Set up your project
steps.body: Create a new Canva design at bookmark size, setting up separate pages or elements for the front and back.

steps.heading: Design the front side
steps.body: Add your main graphics, text, or branding to the front of the bookmark.

steps.heading: Design the back side
steps.body: Create a complementary design for the back, whether that's additional text, a logo, or decorative elements.

steps.heading: Export for print
steps.body: Download both sides in a print-ready format so they can be printed and aligned correctly.

faq.question: Do I need special software to align both sides for printing?
faq.answer: No, Canva's export options are typically sufficient, though you should double-check alignment with your specific printer.

faq.question: Can I use the same bookmark design for marketing purposes?
faq.answer: Yes, double-sided bookmarks work well as marketing or promotional giveaways for businesses and events.

faq.question: What's the ideal size for a bookmark design in Canva?
faq.answer: Standard bookmark dimensions vary, but Canva usually offers a bookmark-specific template size to start from.

faq.question: Can teachers use this for classroom materials?
faq.answer: Yes, double-sided bookmarks work well for educational content, such as reading tips on one side and a reward chart on the other.
